title: thermopsis rhombifolia var. ovata
intro: Thermopsis rhombifolia var. ovata, also known as the Mountain Lupine, is a perennial plant species native to the mountains of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mountain Lupine include reducing symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as improving immune function and antioxidant defenses. Traditional herbal preparations of Thermopsis rhombifolia var. ovata include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
